ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city (in meters) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the weather data belongs to */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date the weather data was recorded */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness level (0-100) */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity level (0-100) */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in km/h) */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall (in millimeters) */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Snowfall (in millimeters) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility (in kilometers) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being evaluated */,
  "data_validity" REAL /* Validity of the data (0-1) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data (0-1) */,
  "data_completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data (0-1) */,
  "data_consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data (0-1) */,
  "data_freshness" REAL /* Freshness of the data (0-1) */,
  "anomaly_detection" INTEGER /* Flag for anomaly detection (true/false) */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule used for data validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
column_names: Country where the city is located

ID of the city the weather data belongs to
